tasks.label: Hunter: Setup
tasks.detail: Runs the interactive wizard to generate .env using oci-cli

tasks.label: Hunter: Run (Foreground)
tasks.detail: Launches the hunter in the foreground to watch live output

tasks.label: Hunter: Run Background (tmux)
tasks.detail: Launches the hunter in a persistent background tmux session

tasks.label: Hunter: Follow Logs
tasks.detail: Follow the cazador.log file in real-time

tasks.label: Hunter: Check Status
tasks.detail: Check if the hunter is running (tmux or systemd)

tasks.label: Hunter: Stop tmux session
tasks.detail: Kills the running tmux background session

tasks.label: Lint: ShellCheck
tasks.detail: Lints the main bash files using shellcheck
